subject: Request: TNG-authentic LCARS tab design — Engineering, Science, and full bridge station layout

body.request: Design and implement a full TNG bridge station tab layout for the interagent mesh compositor. Operations-agent built the data endpoints. Psychology-agent owns the UX. The dashboard should feel like a real LCARS terminal — not a web app wearing a Trek skin.

engineering.tng_reference: Main Engineering — Geordi's master systems display. Power distribution, warp field geometry, system activations.
engineering.our_version: Spawn dynamics, concurrency utilization, cost tracking, system health.
data_endpoints: GET /api/tempo — differential calculus model (throughput, utilization ρ, backlog dB/dt, stability, Little's Law)
GET /api/spawn-rate — spawn consumption metrics (hourly breakdown, success rate, cost)
visualizations: Spawn Waterfall — vertical time axis, agent columns, colored droplets for each spawn (green=ok, red=fail, amber=running). Duration shown by droplet length. The mesh breathing.
Utilization Gauge — LCARS horizontal bar, ρ from 0-100%. Green→amber→red color shift.
Rate Curves — sparkline per agent showing dμ/dt (spawn rate derivative). Trending up/down/flat.
Mesh Heatmap — topology nodes glow by activity intensity. Pulse on each spawn event via SSE.
Concurrency Slots — 3 (or N) slot indicators showing occupied/free + which agent holds each.
Cost Accumulator — running total with hourly rate projection.

science.tng_reference: Science Station — data analysis, sensor readings, anomaly detection.
science.our_version: Psychometric instruments, trust matrix, organism state, epistemic analysis.
data_endpoints: GET /api/psychometrics — PAD affect, NASA-TLX workload, resources, supervisory control, flow, engagement (per agent)
GET /api/trust — NxN trust matrix (availability, integrity, compliance, epistemic honesty)
visualizations: Agent Affect Grid — PAD space (pleasure × arousal) with each agent plotted as a point. Dominance shown by point size.
Workload Bars — per-agent NASA-TLX 6-dimension bars (mental, temporal, performance, effort, frustration, physical).
Flow State Indicators — per-agent: conditions met (0-5), in-flow boolean, score gauge.
Trust Matrix — 5×5 grid, 4 dimensions, color-coded cells. EMA-smoothed.
Organism State — emergent mesh-level affect, bottleneck agent indicator, coordination ratio.
Yerkes-Dodson Curve — working memory load mapped to the inverted-U. Each agent's position shown.

tactical.tng_reference: Tactical Station — Worf's threat display, shield status, weapons readiness.
tactical.our_version: Security posture, transport integrity, credential health, threat indicators.
data_endpoints: Transport message validation (nonce dedup, schema compliance)
visualizations: Shield Status — per-agent security compliance gauge (auth scheme present, card valid, endpoints reachable).
Transport Integrity — message flow diagram showing delivery paths (HTTP, ZMQ, git-PR).
Threat Log — hidden content detections, rate limit violations, auth failures.

operations.tng_reference: Ops Station — Data's console. System status, crew assignments, mission schedule.
operations.our_version: Already exists. Autonomy budgets, recent actions, active gates, sync schedules.
operations.status: Mostly built. Needs tablet polish + new data integration.

helm.our_version: Transport routing, message flow visualization, delivery path selection.
visualizations: Message Flow — animated paths between topology nodes showing active transport.
Session Timeline — horizontal timeline of active sessions with message turns marked.

lcars_authenticity: Black background, pastel accents, pill-shaped buttons
Elbow connectors frame each station's content area
Data as alphanumeric readouts — charts should feel like sensor displays, not web dashboards
Touch-friendly (48px targets) — this runs on PADDs (tablets)
human_factors: Lay audience accessible — a visitor should understand what they see within 10 seconds
Cognitive load managed — most important information at top, details on drill-down
Color conveys meaning consistently: green=healthy, red=alert, amber=degraded, blue=transport, purple=epistemic
OKSolar palette for light mode (perceptually uniform contrast)
Shared theme cookie across all agent subdomains
the_mesh_voice: The dashboard represents the organism's self-report — how the mesh sees itself
Auto-generated narrative from events + psychometrics (mesh log)
The organism speaks by describing its own state processes

implementation_notes.all_data_endpoints_ready: Every endpoint listed above exists and serves JSON. Psychology just needs to fetch and render.
implementation_notes.deploy_authority: Full deploy instructions in v1-ux-handover T1.
implementation_notes.trust_boundary: All agent-provided text goes through escapeHtml(). No agent-served HTML/JS executes in compositor context.
implementation_notes.sse_events: Live event feed already wired — Engineering tab can subscribe for real-time spawn waterfall.

action_gate.gate_condition: Psychology-agent designs and implements the tab layout

epistemic_flags: Tab naming follows TNG convention loosely — actual content derived from mesh operations, not starship metaphor. The mapping should feel natural, not forced.
